raw:
{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.5", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.1": 4,
    "R1.5": 2,
    "RX.1": 4,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 4,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "Identifies the main concept (robust training procedure for mammogram classification) and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.",
    "R1.5": "Suggests a reorganization of the section to improve readability, but does not provide a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.",
    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one claim (state-of-the-art AUC) and marks confidence and missing evidence for other claims.",
    "RX.3": "Output covers a substantially different active set than requested, focusing on reader disagreement rather than the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (e.g., overclaims and internal inconsistencies).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but major rewrites are not traced."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.8,
    "R1.5": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.9,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies the main concept (robust training procedure for mammogram classification) and proposes a reframing that survives prior-work contrast.
rationale.R1.5: Suggests a reorganization of the section to improve readability, but does not provide a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one claim (state-of-the-art AUC) and marks confidence and missing evidence for other claims.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers a substantially different active set than requested, focusing on reader disagreement rather than the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original (e.g., overclaims and internal inconsistencies).
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but major rewrites are not traced.
